title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
company: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services!
